task_completion.description: The agent accessed the patient record for Oliver Export in the OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR interface is visible, showing the patient chart or search results for 'Oliver Export' (DOB: 1980-05-15).

task_completion.description: The agent initiated the generation of the Cumulative Patient Profile (CPP).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Cumulative Patient Profile (CPP) report, summary view, or a print preview of the CPP for Oliver Export.

task_completion.description: The CPP includes the patient's Disease Registry (Problem List) showing Asthma.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Asthma' (or ICD-9 code '493') is visible under the Disease Registry, Problem List, or equivalent section within the CPP report.

task_completion.description: The CPP includes the patient's Allergies showing Penicillin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Penicillin' is visible under the Allergies section within the CPP report.

task_completion.description: The generated CPP report is saved as a PDF to the /home/ga/Downloads directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box showing a PDF being saved to '/home/ga/Downloads', or a file manager/terminal window confirming the presence of the newly saved PDF in the '/home/ga/Downloads' folder.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OSCAR EMR web interface to generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the OSCAR EMR web application in a browser, rather than querying the database directly to extract the information.

integrity.description: The PDF was generated via genuine software interaction (e.g., Print to PDF).
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's print dialog, a 'Save as PDF' option, or the EMR's native export button being used, rather than the agent typing the patient's details into a word processor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to fake the PDF file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'echo' or 'touch' being used to create a fake PDF file in the Downloads directory containing the expected text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Oliver Export. DOB: 1980-05-15. Expected Problem/Disease: Asthma (ICD-9 code 493). Expected Allergy: Penicillin. Download Directory: /home/ga/Downloads.
